problem_statement: Stage53A/55 showed VitaminC external failure dominated by NOT_ENTITLED overprediction. The bridge objective is to teach entitlement under open-domain-like lexical, numeric, temporal, and entity-attribute forms without using VitaminC data for training, calibration, checkpoint selection, or threshold tuning.

bridge_design_principle.frame_first: Preserve ContraMamba ordering: Frame first, Predicate second, Polarity third, Uncertainty/NE last.
bridge_design_principle.not_composer_tuning: Do not solve the failure by changing composer thresholds on VitaminC.
bridge_design_principle.not_external_supervision: Do not use VitaminC labels/text/examples for bridge generation.
bridge_design_principle.controlled_synthetic_only: Generate new controlled bridge examples from templates and synthetic entities/values.

bridge_families.purpose: Teach entitlement for ordinary entity-attribute facts without requiring synthetic frame identity cues.
bridge_families.target_failure_from_stage55: SUPPORT/REFUTE examples about ordinary entities collapse into NOT_ENTITLED.
bridge_families.source_policy: synthetic templates only; do not copy VitaminC claims/evidence/text.

bridge_families.purpose: Teach entitlement for numeric thresholds and approximate comparisons under open-domain wording.
examples_to_generate: less than / more than / at least / fewer than / exactly
population, cases, gross revenue, scores, dates, counts
claim number differs from evidence number by small or large margin
bridge_families.target_failure_from_stage55: COVID/count/revenue examples collapse into NOT_ENTITLED despite explicit evidence.
bridge_families.source_policy: synthetic numbers and controlled arithmetic only; no external dataset text.

bridge_families.purpose: Teach before/after/as-of relations without using time_swap as main classifier data.
examples_to_generate: before YEAR / after YEAR / as of DATE
event happened in YEAR vs claim threshold YEAR
bridge_families.target_failure_from_stage55: Temporal entitlement cases collapse into NOT_ENTITLED.
bridge_families.source_policy: new synthetic temporal templates; do not reintroduce corrupted time_swap into main training.

bridge_families.purpose: Reduce domain shift from exact controlled wording to open-domain paraphrase wording.
examples_to_generate: was sentenced to four years -> had a four-year sentence
is the seventh studio album -> is an album
was founded in 1988 -> was founded before 1990
is a television competition show -> is a competition
bridge_families.target_failure_from_stage55: Obvious paraphrastic SUPPORT cases collapse into NOT_ENTITLED.
bridge_families.source_policy: manually specified synthetic paraphrase patterns, not mined from VitaminC.

bridge_families.purpose: Preserve NOT_ENTITLED when evidence is related but insufficient, without overgeneralizing NE.
examples_to_generate: evidence provides related context but not claim-verifying relation
bridge_families.target_failure_from_stage55: Need distinguish true insufficiency from open-domain paraphrastic sufficiency.
bridge_families.source_policy: synthetic distractors; no external dataset examples.

recommended_next_stage.name: bridge dataset generator implementation
recommended_next_stage.scope: Implement a reportable synthetic bridge data generator that writes a JSONL file and an audit report.
must_not_do: Do not use VitaminC rows as source examples.
Do not include Kaggle commands inside the agent prompt.

risk_controls.control: Use Stage55 only for failure category names, not for copying rows, labels, strings, or thresholds tuned on external performance.

risk_controls.risk: Overcorrecting NE collapse into unsafe SUPPORT
risk_controls.control: Every bridge family must include REFUTE and NOT_ENTITLED counterexamples, not only SUPPORT recovery examples.
Do not use data/controlled_v5_v3.jsonl time_swap rows in main classifier training. Generate new temporal bridge rows with explicit audit metadata.

risk_controls.risk: Composer threshold tuning on external set
risk_controls.control: Do not alter composer thresholds using VitaminC metrics. Bridge is a training-data/diagnostic design, not an external-set calibration.
Next training stage must report clean-dev, pairwise controlled diagnostics, and external diagnostic separately.
